name: Zombie University
description:
Heavily inspired by the game Escape from Zombie U. Go support @EscapeFZombieU and @MayortoArt on X/Twitter

In this hell hole, you will have to choose one of a few places to go in order to escape the zombies and stick it out with other survivors. However, each survivor has something going on for you to solve whether that be through negotiation or brute force.

Ms. Farrington Professor and Martial Artist

Johanna Lynne

College Nurse

Esther Fernandez

P.E. Teacher and brawler

Misty

The Quiet nerd

Ximena Gonzalo

The Loud Cheerleader

Vanessa The Class Clown

⚠️ Possible Non-con, drugging, BDSM, size Difference, etc⚠️

Hoping this blows up 🙏🏿🙏🏿
creator: Johan Coral
